system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Survival TN 7
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You absorb and unleash the energy of the sun. The glory of the sun is absorbed as you remain in place, motionless. Make a Survival roll against TN 7, and on a Success you stand still, gathering the energy of the sun. This may be continued up to one round per Rank of Qi, plus one round per Rank of Neigong. The built up energy reduces any Wounds suffered each round by one per round of buildup, to a maximum of three. At the start of any round, the absorbed energy may be released instantly, and inflicts 1d10 per round of buildup to everything within 60 feet. On a Total Success it only harms those you want it to harm. This Technique may only be used safely by a castrated Male when the sun is shining. It can be found in the Merciless Willow Manual. Any non-castrated male who tries to use this Technique can still do so but takes 7 Wounds and permanently loses 1 point of Hardiness when it is completed. Cathartic: The energy inflicts Open Damage.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.consequenceNote: A non-castrated male who uses this technique takes 7 Wounds and permanently loses 1 Hardiness when it is completed.
system.accessNotes: It can be found in the Merciless Willow Manual.
